name: Pacific Rim Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Green beans, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, heat the oil or margarine.
2. Add garlic, onion, red pepper, chile, and ginger; sauté until softened.
3. Add green beans, tossing to coat evenly.
4. Stir in chicken broth and soy sauce.
5. Cover and cook on moderate heat just until beans are tender-crisp.
